goal:
Deliver ashlr v3 Team Command Center per docs/SPEC-V3-TEAM.md.
1. Foundations: spec import, actor attribution, pro-token identity, activation runbook
2. Team genome sync over api.ashlr.ai (one team memory)
3. Shared inbox: review anywhere with full attribution (E2E-encrypted bodies)
4. Apply routing and daemon leases: owning machine applies, no double-spend
5. Team visibility: snapshots, audit sync, dashboard activity feed
6. Remote kill and team hardening with adversarial suite
7. Team web page on plugin.ashlr.ai (metadata-only) — milestone: Team visibility: snapshots, audit sync, dashboard activity feed
Team visibility: snapshots, audit sync, dashboard activity feed
